g.text: Torrium 2 replacements - remove the coupling assembly. For pricing refer to the Finished Goods Price List.
Coupling assembly replaces adaptor kit & O-ring for Torrium 1.
Spacer washer introduced on HP45-05 models after serial number 07100-621991. Models prior to this require the fitting of
washer W35M1002 after the mechanical seal to increase the clearance between the front impeller & rear diffuser.
Pumps manufactured after Julian date code 12209 (July 2012) require these parts.
Base pump only. Does not require parts 19, 20 & 21.
Kit required when upgrading a -0 or -1 HP model pump to a -2 version of the pump.
